Vision.title:
One vision.
One group.
One transformation.
Vision.p1: Founded by Soukaina Elaouad, a civil engineer and architecture PhD researcher, ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering Group was born from a conviction: exceptional projects require total expertise—from architectural design to project management, BIM, and interior layout.
Vision.p2: In ten years, the group has delivered over 100 projects in premium residential, commercial, urban planning, and interior design. Each achievement carries the same signature: technical rigor, mastered aesthetics, and integrated sustainability from the very first sketch.
Vision.p3: ELAOUAD doesn't just build structures. We sculpt the spaces where the future lives.

Founder.title:
The Vision Behind
the Transformation
Founder.name: Soukaina Elaouad
Founder.intro: A civil engineer by training, architecture PhD researcher, and experienced project manager, Soukaina Elaouad created ELAOUAD Group with a central idea: architectural excellence must never sacrifice technical rigor—nor vice versa.
Founder.philosophy: Her method combines the scientific approach of the engineer—numbers, processes, optimization—with the creative sensitivity of the architect. The result: projects that keep their promises, aesthetically and structurally.
Founder.quote: Architecture is both an artistic act and a technical responsibility. Every project we deliver must be beautiful, solid, sustainable, and useful to the people who will inhabit it.

Events.title: FIDI Forum 2026.
Events.description: FIDI 2026 (International Interior Decoration Forum) is the major event for space design professionals in Africa. Organized by ELAOUAD Group, this forum brings together renowned creators, prestigious brands, and industry decision-makers over four editions to shape tomorrow's trends.

InteriorDesignIntro.title:
Sculpting space, 
 Revealing potential.
InteriorDesignIntro.p1: EAI stands as a specialist in interior layout and space design. We create customized environments for residential and professional projects, combining creative sensitivity with technical rigor.
InteriorDesignIntro.p2: Through 3D visualization prior to execution and our turnkey layout service, we transform every space to reflect your unique identity, while controlling costs and deadlines.

TestimonialsCarousel.title:
Proof of
Trust.
TestimonialsCarousel.desc: What our partners say about our engineering rigor and creativity.

testimonials.quote: ELAOUAD's BIM enabled us to detect 23 structural conflicts before construction. Result: 0 major contingencies, delivered on schedule.
testimonials.author: Technical Director

testimonials.quote: We were looking for a firm capable of managing the complexity of a 5,000 m² project with severe technical constraints. ELAOUAD was the only one to offer an integrated architecture + engineering team.
testimonials.author: CEO

testimonials.quote: FIDI is the must-attend interior decoration event in Africa. Over four editions, we have signed strategic partnerships across 3 continents.
testimonials.author: Sales Director

MayushDesign.title: Discover our interior equipment platform

Conception3D.title: Visualize before executing
Conception3D.announcement: KEY SERVICE: 3D design at EAI is an essential step to validate the design, lighting, and volumes of your project before work begins, reducing the risks of on-site adjustments.
Conception3D.description: At EAI, we help our clients visualize, validate, and refine their space before works are executed. With our photorealistic 3D renders, every detail is mastered.
